docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT SHISLER, ROBERT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF CARTON, MARK $2,544.63 PRINCIPAL, $1,882.16 INTEREST, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,527.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
